title: JMAP Chat on nie-daemon
description: Implement urn:jmap:chat:1 (draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00) on nie-daemon running on localhost. nie relay remains relay-opaque (MLS ciphertext only). nie-daemon decrypts MLS, maintains full JMAP Chat data model locally, and serves JMAP HTTP API to local clients. Maps to the mailbox-per-user topology in the spec. Resolves the privacy/feature tension: relay sees nothing, local daemon has everything.
